company_summary: Snyk is a developer-first security platform that helps teams find and fix vulnerabilities in open source dependencies, containers, infrastructure as code, and proprietary code. The company has grown rapidly and is positioned as a leader in the DevSecOps space, with strong enterprise adoption and deep integrations into developer workflows. Snyk's trajectory is toward embedding AI-assisted security tooling directly into CI/CD pipelines and IDE environments.

contact_targets.title: Product Manager, Platform or Developer Experience
contact_targets.reason: Direct peer or manager to the intern role — best positioned to advocate for Sudheer and assess fit on day-to-day product work

contact_targets.title: Senior Product Manager, Security or AI
contact_targets.reason: Senior IC doing adjacent work — can speak to what the team values and surface referral or informational interview opportunity

contact_targets.title: Technical Recruiter or University Recruiting
contact_targets.reason: Fallback if no PM contacts respond — useful for confirming intern cycle timelines and application status
